blocker: TriDB vector leg / fused tjs_open does not function at N=1,000,000: examined=0 after a 600s ceiling (hang before the first candidate), on 2 of 2 fresh HNSW builds (images gx10-v1-batchedge and gx10-v1-hnswcap). A plain ANN top-10 (ORDER BY embedding <-> lit LIMIT 10) also blocks on a full-corpus Sort (planner does not trust the HNSW ordering at 1M => Sort over ~1M rows). This is the standing publication_gate BLOCKER (HNSW relaxed-monotonicity / opclass binding in the fork's vector iterator; historically ~4/5 fresh builds hang). No TriDB operating point exists at 1M, so no matched-recall latency comparison could be run. Per the honesty guard, no headline number is emitted.

loader_validated.note: Wall 3 (batched gph_insert_edges) IS validated at 1M on BOTH images — this part of the thread's payoff holds.
